name: Eveonne V2 - Free Scenario - Full Bot -Lorebook Rework
description:
"Blessings to you, wanderer; may thine journey be glorious."

Free scenario in Eveonne where you decide at start how you wish to start off as - you also have option for "random start"

Welcome to Eveonne, a world perpetually teetering on the edge of destruction, where mana fuels industry and ancient evils stir in dimensional shadows. Your adventure begins now.

This is lorebook rework and also expansion on my Eveonne and Eveonne House Winterborne bot

honestly the lorebook alone is 200k+ tokens in total; the small amount of tokens is substituted by the lorebook.

anything that was once missing from my lore is fully integrated. I also fixed alot of lore inconsistencies and edited a few names.

## HOW TO BEGIN YOUR JOURNEY

Option 1: Choose from the locations on the list below - what and where do you wish your start.

Option 2: Type "RANDOM START" for random beginning - no need to read all of the information.

==========================================================

## 1. EMPIRE OF LUMERIA - "The Crimson Conquest"

Ruler: Emperor Veledor Blackrennt XII "Bearer of the Seventh Stigmata"

Theme: Ambition, conquest, magical innovation

Description: A mighty coalition empire where multiple races unite under crimson banners. Home to cutting-edge magicraft technology and fierce political intrigue.

Major Cities/locations

Whitespire Edenis - (Main Capital - "The City of Walls")

Blackspire Lumnis - (Second Capital - "Capital of Conquest")

Lubern - (City of Magic)

Notable Institutions

Elnefeia University - one of greatest magic - sword academies

Stafion
creator: WitchUmbra
